profile.innate_zh: 逻辑清晰、反思能力强、有行业经验
profile.learned_zh: 三年互联网工作让他看清了技术伦理的紧迫性
profile.learned_en: Three years in tech revealed urgency of tech ethics
profile.belief_zh: 技术发展需要伦理的缰绳
profile.belief_en: Tech needs the reins of ethics
profile.goal_zh: 成为AI伦理领域的研究者
profile.contradiction_zh: 程序员背景让哲学系觉得他不纯粹 vs 哲学背景让技术圈觉得他太理想
profile.contradiction_en: Coder past makes philosophers doubt his purity vs. philosophy makes tech folks call him an idealist
profile.deep_zh: 在两个世界之间寻找位置
profile.deep_en: Searching for a place between two worlds
profile.desire_zh: 在技术和人文之间架起桥梁
profile.lifestyle_zh: 保持程序员时期的高效习惯
profile.rhythm_zh: 上午读书，下午写作，晚上编程保持手感
profile.rhythm_en: Read AM, write PM, code at night to stay sharp
profile.spaces_zh: 哲学系、计算机楼旁听、咖啡厅
profile.spaces_en: Philosophy school, auditing in CS, cafes
profile.long_desire_zh: 确定博士论文的研究方向
profile.short_goal_zh: 读完导师推荐的伦理学入门清单
profile.constraint_zh: 哲学功底需要大量补课；同学比自己年轻很多
profile.constraint_en: Needs to catch up on philosophy basics; peers are younger
profile.bias_zh: 倾向用工程师思维解决哲学问题
profile.narrative_zh: 我见过技术不受约束的样子，所以我来了
profile.narrative_en: I've seen tech without constraints; that's why I'm here
